highlights: Developed a dual-autoencoder framework for efficient cross-robot fine-tuning using asymmetric Info-VAEs and a unified cross-embodiment action space.
Validated RDT policies in RoboTwin/ManiSkill3 and conducted preliminary deployment on a Unitree H1-2 humanoid with a RoboTera dexterous hand.
Designed a recursive action-averaging strategy for smooth and robust real-world control.
Developed a sparse-data VLA fine-tuning pipeline combining trajectory/video augmentation with real-world reinforcement learning.

work.company: The Chinese University of Hong Kong Shenzhen
highlights: Built a fully autonomous ultrasound-guided biopsy system using a UR5e arm, ROS, U-Net++, 3D reconstruction, slice-to-volume registration, force/pose control, and reinforcement learning.
Proposed a robot-assisted quantitative compression elastography framework for accurate elasticity measurement.

education.institution: The Chinese University of Hong Kong Shenzhen
education.area: M.Phil. in Computer and Information Engineering

projects.name: Development of Data Collection System and Real-World Deployment Experiments on DP3 (Apr. 2025 – May 2025)
projects.description: Developed data-collection tooling for the RoboTera dexterous hand and Unitree H1-2 humanoid, supported real-world DP3 deployment experiments, and contributed to paper writing.

projects.name: Action Chunking Transformer Reimplementation and Demonstration at DTEC (Nov. 2024 – Dec. 2024)
projects.description: Contributed to teleoperation development and ACT/OpenTeleVision reproduction and adaptation; demonstrated the system at the TeleAI Developer Conference.

projects.name: Spectrum-Sensing Chip for Explosive Detection (Dec. 2022 – May 2023)
projects.description: Graduation project awarded Excellent Graduation Design by the School of Electronic Science and Engineering, Jilin University.

projects.name: Vehicle Intelligent-Arm Grasping System Based on Motion Matching (May 2021 – May 2022)
projects.description: Team leader; awarded Outstanding Provincial Project.

publications.publisher: IEEE International Conference on Real-time Computing and Robotics (RCAR)
publications.summary: A robot-assisted quantitative compression elastography framework for accurate elasticity measurement. Best Conference Paper Finalist nominee.

publications.publisher: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
publications.summary: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics. Chenwei Wang led the real-world robotic experiments.

publications.summary: A fully autonomous ultrasound-guided biopsy system integrating image analysis, 3D reconstruction, registration, robot control, and reinforcement learning.

publications.name: Align-Then-stEer: Adapting the Vision-Language Action Models through Unified Latent Guidance
publications.publisher: The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)
publications.summary: A data-efficient, plug-and-play framework for adapting vision-language-action models across tasks and robot embodiments through unified latent guidance.
